objects.description: Embrace cozy modern farmhouse living in this thoughtfully designed single-story home offering 1,828 sq ft of living space. Ideal for downsizing or first-time homeowners, this plan features 2 spacious bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms. The inviting front porch provides an ideal entry, leading into a welcoming foyer with convenient storage. Enjoy the stunning vaulted living room highlighted by exposed beams and a beautiful brick fireplace, creating a warm and inviting ambiance. The gourmet kitchen boasts modern cabinetry, ample counter space, and an oversized island with seating—perfect for entertaining or casual dining. Adjacent to the kitchen, a bright dining area features direct access to the covered rear porch, making indoor-outdoor living effortless. Retreat to the luxurious primary suite,
